[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111010110 7
1 0111111101 8
2 1001111111 8
3 1111111111 a
4 0111001101 6
5 0111111010 7
6 1010111111 8
7 1101000111 6

01 10 1010111110 7
12 21 1110011111 8
23 32 1111011111 9

45 54 1110110111 8
56 65 1100110111 7
67 76 1101000111 6 match 7
70 07 1111111111 a match 3

13 31 1011011111 8
24 42 1110010011 6

61 16 1100011111 7
72 27 1111010011 7
